value.found_quote: Prompt caching makes Claude Code faster and more cost-efficient. Without caching, the API would reprocess your full history on every turn. With caching, it reuses what it already processed and only does new work for what changed.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes Anthropic's prompt/context caching feature as an active, generally available capability. It explains that caching reduces latency ("faster") and cost ("more cost-efficient") by reusing previously processed context rather than reprocessing it on every turn. The page covers the feature in depth, including how it works, what invalidates it, and how to optimize it — all consistent with a generally available offering.
